/data/user/0/ru.iiec.cxxdroid/files/bin/clang++ -Wall -std=c++17 -fallow-void-main -lm -ldl -llog -lz CMakeFiles/Mystic-Gems.dir/src/About.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mystic-Gems.dir/src/Button.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mystic-Gems.dir/src/ColorIndex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mystic-Gems.dir/src/ComboText.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mystic-Gems.dir/src/Cursor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mystic-Gems.dir/src/ElementGUI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mystic-Gems.dir/src/Font.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mystic-Gems.dir/src/Fragment.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mystic-Gems.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mystic-Gems.dir/src/Gem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mystic-Gems.dir/src/Instructions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mystic-Gems.dir/src/Layout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mystic-Gems.dir/src/MainMenu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mystic-Gems.dir/src/SoundManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mystic-Gems.dir/src/Textures.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mystic-Gems.dir/src/Timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mystic-Gems.dir/src/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mystic-Gems.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o Mystic-Gems  /data/data/ru.iiec.cxxdroid/files/sysroot/lib/libsfml-system-s.a /data/data/ru.iiec.cxxdroid/files/sysroot/lib/libsfml-window-s.a /data/data/ru.iiec.cxxdroid/files/sysroot/lib/libsfml-graphics-s.a /data/data/ru.iiec.cxxdroid/files/sysroot/lib/libsfml-network-s.a /data/data/ru.iiec.cxxdroid/files/sysroot/lib/libsfml-audio-s.a /data/data/ru.iiec.cxxdroid/files/sysroot/lib/libsfml-window-s.a -lfreetype -lpng -lEGL -lGLESv1_CM -lGLESv2 -lOpenSLES -landroid -lm -ldl -llog -lz -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--require-defined -Wl,cxxdroid_gui_link --shared /data/data/ru.iiec.cxxdroid/files/sysroot/lib/libsfml-system-s.a -llog -lopenal -llog -lOpenSLES -lFLAC -lvorbisenc -lvorbisfile -lvorbis -logg
